name: Get a book from Book Detail View and Read from Book Detail View (ANDROID)
fullName: Books transactions in Palace Bookshelf: Get a book from Book Detail View and Read from Book Detail View (ANDROID)

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "Palace Bookshelf" on Add library screen
Then  Account "Palace Bookshelf" is present on Accounts screen
And  Search for 'Flower Fables' and save bookName as 'bookNameInfo'
When  Open EBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Click GET action button on book details screen
And  Click READ action button on book details screen
Then  'bookInfo' book is present on epub reader screen

labels.name: story
labels.value: Get a book from Book Detail View and Read from Book Detail View (ANDROID)
